goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'centre' and should serve 'gastropub' food.
The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be 'in the same area as the restaurant' and should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should serve gastropub food
The restaurant should be in the expensive price range
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the restaurant and should be in the type of college
Make sure you get postcode and entrance fee
